query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A sepia-toned composite portrait showing two overlapping views of the same bearded person's head. One view captures the face from a low frontal angle with the mouth open showing teeth, while the second view appears above and behind it, showing the head tilted backward with eyes closed and chin raised. The person has dark hair and visible facial hair. The bare shoulders are visible at the bottom of the frame. The background is a plain light surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sepia-toned double exposure portrait creating a surreal, ghostly overlay of two states of the same bearded person: a low-angle snarling face with bared teeth in the foreground, and a second exposure above it showing the head thrown back with eyes closed in an anguished or ecstatic pose. The muted, faded sepia palette and layered transparency produce an unsettling, dreamlike effect that conveys intense negative emotion through the distorted juxtaposition of aggression and vulnerability in a single composite frame.
